nodes.name: LOOP_RESHAPE
nodes.source_code:
for _ in pypto.loop(0, 1, 1,
    name="LOOP_RESHAPE", idx_name="dummy"):
    k_cache_index = pypto.reshape(k_cache_index_in, [t, 1], inplace=True)          # L240
    w_qb_scale    = pypto.reshape(w_qb_scale_in, [1, head_num*head_dim], ...)       # L242
    gamma_2d      = pypto.reshape(ln_gamma_k_in, [1, ln_gamma_k_in.shape[0]], ...)  # L243
    beta_2d       = pypto.reshape(ln_beta_k_in,  [1, ln_beta_k_in.shape[0]],  ...)  # L245
    w_qb          = pypto.reshape(w_qb_in,  [q_lora_rank, head_num*head_dim], ...)  # L247
    wk            = pypto.reshape(wk_in,   [h, head_dim], inplace=True)             # L248
    w_proj        = pypto.reshape(w_proj_in, [h, head_num], inplace=True)           # L249

nodes.name: loop_unroll · IndexerPrologQuantQuantLoop
nodes.source_code:
for tIdx, unrollLength in pypto.loop_unroll(
    0, t, 1,
    name="IndexerPrologQuantQuantLoop",
    idx_name="tIdx",
    unroll_list=unroll_list):   # L252–253
    # 每次处理 t_tile 个 token，tIdx 为当前 tile 起始偏移

nodes.name: Tile 准备
nodes.source_code:
# IR 生成器从主循环体各处汇聚所有 tile 切片操作
q_norm       = pypto.view(q_norm_in,       [t_tile, q_lora_rank],   [tIdx, 0], ...)  # L266
q_norm_scale = pypto.view(q_norm_scale_in, [t_tile, 1],             [tIdx, 0], ...)  # L267
rope_cos     = pypto.view(cos_idx_rope_in, [t_tile, rope_head_dim], [tIdx, 0], ...)  # L287
rope_sin     = pypto.view(sin_idx_rope_in, [t_tile, rope_head_dim], [tIdx, 0], ...)  # L289
x            = pypto.view(x_in,            [t_tile, h],             [tIdx, 0], ...)  # L317

nodes.name: Query 支路
nodes.source_code:
# Query 计算支路（L266–L309）
# 含五个语义阶段：Linear → Dequant → Rope3D → Hadamard → Quant

nodes.name: Query-Linear
nodes.source_code:
pypto.set_semantic_label("Query-Linear")              # L268
pypto.set_cube_tile_shapes([L0M,L1M],[L0K,L1K],[L0N,L1N], True)  # L269
q_s32 = pypto.matmul(q_norm, w_qb, pypto.DT_INT32)   # L272
# q_norm: INT8 [t_tile, q_lora_rank]
# w_qb:   INT8 [q_lora_rank, head_num*head_dim]
# → q_s32: INT32 [t_tile, head_num*head_dim]

nodes.name: Query-Dequant
nodes.source_code:
pypto.set_semantic_label("Query-Dequant")             # L274
q_f32  = pypto.cast(q_s32, pypto.DT_FP32)            # L276
q_f32  = q_f32 * q_norm_scale                        # L277
q_f32  = q_f32 * w_qb_scale                          # L278
q_cast = pypto.cast(q_f32, x_dtype)                  # L279  → BF16
q_bf16 = pypto.reshape(q_cast, [t_tile,head_num,head_dim], ...)  # L281
q_rope = pypto.view(q_bf16, [t_tile,head_num,rope_head_dim], [0,0,0], ...)       # L283
q_nope = pypto.view(q_bf16, [t_tile,head_num,head_dim-rope_head_dim], [0,0,R], ...)  # L285

nodes.name: Query-Rope3D
nodes.source_code:
q_roped = rope_3d(q_rope, rope_cos, rope_sin)        # L292  → 内联展开

def rope_3d(x, cos, sin):  # L181–202
    cast_cos = pypto.cast(cos, pypto.DT_FP32)        # L193
    cast_sin = pypto.cast(sin, pypto.DT_FP32)        # L194
    x_view   = pypto.cast(x,   pypto.DT_FP32)        # L196
    cast_cos = pypto.reshape(cast_cos, [t_tile,1,rope_dim])  # L197
    cast_sin = pypto.reshape(cast_sin, [t_tile,1,rope_dim])  # L198
    # rotate_half 内联（L176–178）
    x_embed  = (x_view * cast_cos) + (rotate_half(x_view) * cast_sin)  # L200
    return pypto.cast(x_embed, x_dtype)              # L201

q_nope = pypto.cast(pypto.cast(q_nope, DT_FP32), q_bf16.dtype)  # L294
q_concat = pypto.concat([q_roped, q_nope], -1)       # L295

nodes.name: Query-Hadamard
nodes.source_code:
pypto.set_semantic_label("Query-Hadamard")            # L298
hadamard_q = pypto.reshape(hadamard_q_in, [1,head_dim,head_dim], ...)  # L296
q_hadamard = pypto.matmul(q_concat, hadamard_q, x_dtype)  # L301
# q_concat:   BF16 [t_tile, head_num, head_dim]
# hadamard_q: BF16 [1, head_dim, head_dim]
# → q_hadamard: BF16 [t_tile, head_num, head_dim]

nodes.name: Query-Quant
nodes.source_code:
pypto.set_semantic_label("Query-Quant")               # L303
q_res = prolog_quant(q_hadamard)                      # L305  → 内联展开

def prolog_quant(input):  # L146–163
    input_fp32 = pypto.cast(input, pypto.DT_FP32)    # L150
    abs_res    = pypto.abs(input_fp32)                # L152
    max_value  = pypto.amax(abs_res, dim=-1, keepdim=True)  # L153
    scale_q    = pypto.full(..., 127.0) / max_value   # L154–156
    out_fp32   = input_fp32 * scale_q                 # L157
    out_int8   = cast→INT32→FP16→INT8                 # L158–160
    scale_deq  = pypto.full(..., 1.0) / scale_q       # L161–162
    return (out_int8, scale_deq)

pypto.assemble(q_res[0], [tIdx,0,0], q_int8_out)      # L308
pypto.assemble(q_scale,  [tIdx,0,0], q_scale_out)     # L309

nodes.name: Key 支路
nodes.source_code:
# Key 计算支路（L313–L341）
# 含六个语义阶段：Linear → LayerNorm → Rope2D → Hadamard → Quant → ScatterUpdate

nodes.name: Key-Linear
nodes.source_code:
pypto.set_semantic_label("Key-Linear")                # L313
x = pypto.view(x_in, [t_tile, h], [tIdx, 0], ...)    # L317
k = pypto.matmul(x, wk, pypto.DT_FP32)               # L318
# x:  BF16 [t_tile, H]
# wk: BF16 [H, head_dim]
# → k: FP32 [t_tile, head_dim]

nodes.name: Key-LayerNorm
nodes.source_code:
k_bf16 = pypto.cast(
    quant_layer_norm(k, gamma_2d, beta_2d, -1, attrs.eps),
    x_dtype)  # L321  → 内联展开

def quant_layer_norm(x, gamma, beta, dim, epsilon):  # L102–124
    pypto.set_semantic_label("Key-LayerNorm")        # L103
    x_fp32   = pypto.cast(x, pypto.DT_FP32)         # L108
    x_scaled = x_fp32 * (1.0 / dim)                 # L110
    mean     = pypto.sum(x_scaled, dim, keepdim=True)# L111
    diff     = x_fp32 - mean                         # L113
    var      = pypto.sum(diff*diff*(1/dim), dim, keepdim=True)  # L115–116
    std      = pypto.sqrt(var + epsilon)             # L119
    res32    = diff / std                            # L120
    return pypto.cast(res32*gamma + beta, x.dtype)  # L122–124

nodes.name: Key-Rope2D
nodes.source_code:
k_roped = quant_rope_2d(k_rope, rope_cos, rope_sin)  # L326  → 内联展开

def quant_rope_2d(x, cos, sin):  # L127–143
    pypto.set_semantic_label("Key-Rope2D")           # L128
    cast_cos = pypto.cast(cos, pypto.DT_FP32)        # L136
    cast_sin = pypto.cast(sin, pypto.DT_FP32)        # L137
    x_view   = pypto.cast(x,   pypto.DT_FP32)        # L138
    # rotate_half 内联（L176–178）
    x_embed  = (x_view * cast_cos) + (rotate_half(x_view) * cast_sin)  # L141
    return pypto.cast(x_embed, x.dtype)              # L142

nodes.name: Key-Hadamard
nodes.source_code:
pypto.set_semantic_label("Key-Hadamard")             # L330
hadamard_k = pypto.matmul(k_concat, hadamard_k_in, x_dtype)  # L331
# k_concat:    BF16 [t_tile, head_dim]
# hadamard_k_in: BF16 [head_dim, head_dim]
# → hadamard_k: BF16 [t_tile, head_dim]

nodes.name: Key-Quant
nodes.source_code:
pypto.set_semantic_label("Key-Quant")                # L332
k_res = prolog_quant(hadamard_k)                     # L333  → 内联展开
# prolog_quant() 同 Query-Quant，见 L146–163

nodes.name: Key-ScatterUpdate
nodes.source_code:
k_cache_4D = pypto.reshape(k_res[0], [t_tile,1,1,head_dim], ...)  # L334
k_scale_4D = pypto.reshape(cast(k_res[1],FP16), [t_tile,1,1,1], ...)  # L335
index = pypto.view(k_cache_index, [t_tile,1], [tIdx,0], ...)  # L338
k_int8_out.move(
    pypto.scatter_update(k_cache, SCATTER_DIM, index, k_cache_4D))   # L340
k_scale_out.move(
    pypto.scatter_update(k_cache_scale, SCATTER_DIM, index, k_scale_4D))  # L341

nodes.name: Weight 支路
nodes.source_code:
pypto.set_semantic_label("Weight-Linear")            # L343
weights   = pypto.cast(
    pypto.matmul(x, w_proj, x_dtype), pypto.DT_FP32)# L349
weights   = pypto.mul(weights,
    1.0/(math.sqrt(head_num)*math.sqrt(head_dim)))   # L350
weights_f16 = pypto.cast(weights, pypto.DT_FP16)    # L351
pypto.assemble(weights_f16, [tIdx,0], weights_out)   # L352

source_ref.code: q_s32 = pypto.matmul(q_norm, w_qb, pypto.DT_INT32)  # [t_tile, head_num * head_dim]
q_hadamard = pypto.matmul(q_concat, hadamard_q, x_dtype)  # [t_tile, head_num, head_dim]
